title: Pelican hunting at Ocean Surface Coloring Page
seoTitle: Pelican hunting at Ocean Surface Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a detailed pelican hunting fish at the ocean surface with waves and sky. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Some species, like the brown pelican, hunt by plunge-diving into the ocean from heights of up to 60 feet.
pelicans have a large throat pouch (gular pouch) that can hold up to 3 gallons of water, used to scoop up fish like a net.
